text: TRUMP: 'A whole civilization will die tonight.' Threatened every bridge and power plant in Iran. 'Not at all' concerned about war crimes. Iran rejected 45-day ceasefire with 10 conditions. DEADLINE 8PM ET.

sources.name: CNN — Trump threatens Iran
NPR — Iran war updates

text: NETANYAHU PASSOVER ADDRESS: Compares strikes to 'Ten Plagues.' Claims 70% of Iran's steel production destroyed. 'This is no longer the same Iran.' IDF eliminated missile commander Makram Atimi in Kermanshah.

sources.name: Times of Israel — Netanyahu Passover address
Jerusalem Post — Atimi killed

text: UNSC VETO: Russia and China block Bahrain-sponsored Hormuz resolution. Vote 11-2. Multilateral path to reopening strait now dead. Trump deadline only remaining pressure.

sources.name: Washington Post — Russia China veto
PBS — UNSC vote

text: IRAN CUTS TIES: Tehran officially severs all diplomatic and indirect channels with US after Trump's 'civilization will die' threat. Pakistan back-channel still active.

sources.name: Iran International — Iran cuts contact
Business Upturn — Iran cuts diplomacy

text: JUBAIL HIT: IRGC fires 11 ballistic missiles + 18 drones at Saudi Eastern Province. All intercepted but debris strikes SABIC petrochemical complex. Fire at Jubail Industrial City. Evacuations underway.

sources.name: Al-Monitor — Iran attacks Jubail
Jerusalem Post — Jubail attack

text: KHAMENEI LEAK: US/Israeli intel memo — Mojtaba Khamenei unconscious and incapacitated in Qom. Wounded Feb 28. Never appeared publicly. Only AI-generated video. Iran insists he governs.

sources.name: Jerusalem Post — Khamenei unconscious
Newsweek — Iran supreme leader

text: IRAN PEACE PLAN: 10-point proposal includes security guarantees, Hormuz toll (~$2M/ship), sanctions lifting. Trump: 'significant but not good enough.' Diplomatic channels cut hours later.

sources.name: Al Jazeera — Iran's 10-point plan
Gulf News — Peace plan details

text: KING FAHD CAUSEWAY CLOSED: Saudi-Bahrain bridge shut over Iranian air raid threats. US shelter-in-place for Americans in Bahrain. IDF hits Khorramshahr shipyards (80% of IRGC Navy). Kittleson freed in Baghdad.

sources.name: WTOP — Causeway closed
ABC News — Kittleson freed

text: CLUSTER BARRAGE: Iran fires 6 ballistic missile salvos at central/southern Israel — ~10 missiles per salvo with cluster munitions. ~50 submunition impact sites across Petah Tikva, Ramat Gan, Bnei Brak. 6 wounded including 1 seriously.

sources.name: Times of Israel — Iran fires salvos at Israel
FDD Long War Journal — Cluster munitions strike dozens of sites

text: IDF SHIRAZ STRIKES: Joint IAF/Navy operation destroys Iran's 'most central' sonar production facility + last remaining petrochemical plant for ballistic missile explosives. IDF claims 85%+ of Iran's petrochemical export capacity now inoperable.

sources.name: ANI News — IDF strikes underwater detection facility in Shiraz
The Media Line — IDF strikes petrochemical facility and missile site

text: ALI AL SALEM HIT: Iranian drone strike hits Ali Al Salem Air Base in Kuwait overnight — 15 Americans wounded. Most returned to duty. IRGC claims as part of Wave 98 of Operation True Promise 4.

sources.name: APA — 15 Americans wounded at Ali al-Salem
Al Mayadeen — Iranian drone strike on Ali Al Salem

text: ⚡ CEASEFIRE: Trump agrees to 2-week suspension of bombing Iran, subject to 'COMPLETE, IMMEDIATE, and SAFE OPENING of the Strait of Hormuz.' Pakistan PM Sharif mediated. Bloomberg: 'two-week ceasefire to finalize talks.'

sources.name: US News — Trump suspends bombing of Iran for two weeks
CNBC — Trump suspends Iran attack for two weeks
Bloomberg — Two-week ceasefire to finalize talks

text: IRAN ACCEPTS: Supreme National Security Council formally accepts two-week ceasefire. FM Araghchi: 'Safe passage through Hormuz will be possible via coordination with Iran's Armed Forces.' China gave 'last-minute nudge.'

sources.name: PBS — Iran's SNSC accepts ceasefire
Al Jazeera — Iran agrees to reopen Hormuz

text: OIL CRASH: Brent plunges ~16% to ~$93, WTI drops ~19% to ~$92 in after-hours — biggest one-day drop since 1991 Gulf War. S&P 500 futures +2.4%, Dow +1,000 pts. Markets rebound by morning on ceasefire skepticism.

sources.name: Axios — Oil prices plunge on ceasefire
NBC News — Oil prices plunge, stocks rally

text: ISLAMABAD TALKS: Pakistan confirms peace talks begin Friday April 10. VP Vance to lead US delegation. PM Sharif: 'Both parties have displayed remarkable wisdom.' Goal: conclusive agreement within 2-week window.

sources.name: Axios — US, Iran ceasefire via Pakistan
Al Jazeera — Why Vance joined Pakistan mediation

text: NETANYAHU RESISTS: Israeli PM asked Trump NOT to accept ceasefire, citing 'significant risks.' Israel not party to the agreement. IDF operations in Lebanon continue. Ground troops pushing deeper into southern Lebanon.

sources.name: Times of Israel — Netanyahu asks Trump not to move forward with ceasefire
Jerusalem Post — IDF operations continue

text: GAS UPDATE: AAA national average $4.119/gal (April 8). First time above $4 since August 2022. EIA forecasts April peak at $4.30/gal. GasBuddy: ceasefire means 'two more weeks of status quo' — pump prices won't drop quickly.

sources.name: AAA — Fuel Prices
AAA Newsroom — First time in four years over $4

text: ⚡ CEASEFIRE VIOLATED: Iran launches missile barrage at Israel & Gulf states ~10 min AFTER Trump's ceasefire announcement. Sirens across Israel. 4 injured Tel Sheva. Jubail (Saudi) struck. Habshan gas fire (UAE). Bahrain sirens nationwide. Ceasefire compliance uncertain.

sources.name: Jerusalem Post — Iran violates ceasefire with missile barrage
Jerusalem Post — Sirens across Israel despite ceasefire

text: KHAMENEI ORDERS CEASEFIRE: Supreme Leader instructs all military units to cease fire. State TV: 'This is not the end of the war.' SNSC: 'Nearly all war objectives achieved.' Despite initial violation, ceasefire appears to be holding by morning.

sources.name: Organiser — Khamenei orders halt, warns war not over
Axios — How Iran's supreme leader reached a truce

text: NETANYAHU: Ceasefire 'does not include Lebanon.' Israel supports US Iran pause but IDF operations in Lebanon continue. Contradicts Pakistan PM Sharif claim of 'ceasefire everywhere.' 3 conditions set for Lebanon talks.

sources.name: Al Jazeera — Netanyahu says ceasefire does not include Lebanon
Al-Monitor — Netanyahu backs ceasefire, excludes Lebanon

text: OIL SETTLES: Brent stabilizes ~$95.80 (+20.0%), WTI ~$97.28 (+28.8%) after ceasefire crash. Physical dated Brent hit RECORD $144.42 — highest since 1987. Stock futures surging: Dow +1,000, S&P +2.4%, Nikkei +4.9%.

sources.name: NBC News — Oil prices plunge 15%, stocks rally
CNBC — Oil prices plunge below $100

text: JOURNALIST FREED: American journalist Shelly Kittleson released from Kataib Hezbollah in Iraq via prisoner swap. Rubio: 'We are relieved this American is now freed.' Told to leave Iraq immediately.

sources.name: Washington Post — Journalist Shelly Kittleson freed

text: GAS UPDATE: AAA national average $4.14/gal (April 8 PM). Up 2¢ in 24 hours. Analysts: could fall below $4 within 1-2 weeks IF ceasefire holds and Hormuz reopens. But expert warns 'do little or nothing' for prices short-term.

sources.name: AAA — Fuel Prices
KPLC TV — Average gas price up 2 cents in 24 hours

text: LAVAN ISLAND STRUCK: Iran's Lavan Island oil refinery attacked hours after ceasefire. Fire contained, no casualties. Iranian state TV confirmed. Vance warns ceasefire 'tentative.'

sources.name: WTOP — Lavan Island refinery attacked

text: IRAN RETALIATES: Iran launches missiles/drones at Kuwait, UAE, Bahrain after Lavan strike. Kuwait intercepts 28 drones. Bahrain downs 31 drones + 6 missiles. 2 Bahraini civilians injured Sitra.

sources.name: Al Jazeera — Gulf states report attacks despite ceasefire
Arab Times — Kuwait intercepts 28 drones

text: HORMUZ TRANSIT: First ships through Strait of Hormuz since ceasefire. Greek NJ Earth, Liberian Daytona Beach transit. Only 7 out, 3 in. 800+ vessels still trapped. Iran requires Armed Forces coordination.

sources.name: Manila Times — First ships through Hormuz
Bloomberg — Hormuz stays blocked

text: SYNAGOGUE ADMISSION: IDF admits Tehran strike targeting Khatam al-Anbiya commander caused 'collateral damage' to Rafi Niya Synagogue — 'completely destroyed' during Passover. Torah scrolls under rubble.

sources.name: Times of Israel — IDF admits synagogue collateral damage

text: TRUMP: Declares Iran 'regime change.' Demands no uranium enrichment. Proposes 'joint venture' with Iran for Hormuz. Threatens 50% tariffs on countries supplying weapons to Iran. Calls Iran's Farsi ceasefire version 'fraudulent.'

sources.name: Times of Israel liveblog — Trump statements
NPR — Trump: regime change

text: HEGSETH: Pentagon briefing claims 'every single objective achieved.' WaPo: officials say Hegseth 'misrepresenting US position' — more than half Iran's missiles reportedly intact. Fact-check: misleading.

sources.name: The Hill — Pentagon briefing
Washington Post — Hegseth misrepresenting

text: LEBANON MASSACRE: Israel launches 'Operation Eternal Darkness' — largest coordinated strike on Lebanon. 50 IAF jets hit 100+ Hezbollah targets with 160 munitions in 10 minutes. 254 killed, 1,165+ wounded. Central Beirut struck without warning during rush hour.

sources.name: Al Jazeera — Israel kills 254 in Lebanon strikes
PBS News — Israel strikes central Beirut without warning

text: IRAN MISSILE BARRAGE: Iran launched missiles at Israel despite ceasefire — sirens across southern, central, northern Israel. 3 children aged 12-15 injured in Tel Sheva, Negev. Mojtaba Khamenei ordered stop ~2 hours after ceasefire; another barrage fired toward Be'er Sheva after order.

sources.name: JPost — Sirens across Israel as Iran launches missiles despite ceasefire
Haaretz — Three children injured in Negev

text: SIRRI ISLAND: Explosions struck Iran's Sirri Island crude export facilities at ~06:30 GMT, in addition to Lavan. Combined, Lavan + Sirri = ~25% of Iran's crude export volume. No party claimed responsibility.

sources.name: Business Upturn — Explosions at Sirri Island
YNet News — Explosions on Iranian islands

text: UAE ATTACKED: UAE intercepted 17 ballistic missiles + 35 drones from Iran. Abu Dhabi's Habshan gas complex operations temporarily suspended after debris fire. Kuwait: 'severe material damage' at Kuwait Petroleum Corporation.

sources.name: Khaleej Times — UAE intercepts 17 ballistic missiles, 35 drones
CNBC — Gulf countries scramble to intercept missiles

text: HORMUZ RE-CLOSED: Iran suspends Strait of Hormuz transit citing Israel's Lebanon strikes. Fars: tanker traffic 'suspended.' IRGC warns of 'heavy response.' White House denies closure, says strait is open.

sources.name: Washington Post — Iran closes Hormuz over Lebanon strikes
Euronews — Iran closes Strait of Hormuz

text: IRAQ: Islamic Resistance in Iraq suspends military operations for 2 weeks in support of US-Iran ceasefire. Houthis announce conditional ceasefire with US — but will attack Israel independently.

sources.name: Xinhua — Iraqi militia suspends operations
JPost — Houthis attack Israel independently of Iran

text: OIL UPDATE: Brent settles ~$94.22 (+18.1%), WTI ~$94.25 (+24.8%). Continued slide from morning. Hormuz re-closure by Iran threatens price recovery. Gas $4.164/gal (+30.8%). Markets may reverse gains.

sources.name: Fortune — Oil price drop after ceasefire
AAA — Fuel Prices
